title: Yijing Hexagram 64: Wei Ji (Before Completion)
description: Hexagram 64 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 64 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Before Completion. Success. But if the little fox, after nearly completing the crossing, gets his tail in the water, there is nothing that would further.
